subject: Sports
title: March Madness: College Basketball's Big Stage
description: A quick win: understand March Madness: College Basketball's Big Stage.

hook.text: Every March, 68 college teams battle in a single-elimination tournament that captivates all of America.

buildup.text: The NCAA Tournament's single-elimination format means one bad game sends you home. The pressure is immense.

discovery.text: Office bracket pools involve over 100 million Americans. Correctly predicting every game is virtually impossible.

twist.text: A 16-seed had never beaten a 1-seed—until UMBC shocked Virginia in 2018, the ultimate upset.

climax.text: March Madness generates over $1 billion annually, making it one of the most valuable sporting events.

punchline.text: One loss and you're done. That's why they call it Madness.

quiz.question: What makes March Madness so unpredictable?
options: Its single-elimination format where one loss ends your run
Games are played on neutral courts only
